CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TAN, ANDREW, DBA ANDREW'S TOUCH PAINTING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot because plaintiff filed a first amended complaint. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CINDY LEE, TEL. NO. 885-5800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANDREW TAM, DBA ANDREW'S TOUCH PAINTING'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is Granted. Plaintiff Raymond Fang filed a statement of non-opposition to the motion and concedes that Cindy Lee, Esq. was not an authorized person to receive service of summon for Defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
